variants.title: WG804
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF212843B Special Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WG804
variants.description: The FF212843B is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Filtrec WG804. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Filtrec filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our glass fiber media and a durable design, the FF212843B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 110.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 89.0 mm, Length: 386.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: IN-OUT
